title: Silver's Better Desert Biome!
description: Does the vanilla minecraft desert just feels empty to you?
body:
# Description:
Does the vanilla minecraft desert just feels empty to you?

well with this datapack the deserts is now filled with more structures and loot than a normal desert, while requiring no resource pack!



## Summary
The desert biome will now contain some new structures and decoration all scattered around the desert to make it more lively!





<details>
<summary>Structures</summary>

## Structures:
- Mini Ruins\
These are small structures that are made to hide in the sand, these contains loot similar to desert temples.

there is also the super rare one that contains 2 chests, one exposed and one hidden, the hidden chest has these loot and the chances:\
• Diamond 73%\
• Golden Apple 20%\
• Enchanted Golden Apple 5%\
• Dune Armor Trim Smithing Template 2%

### Note:
the secret chest only gives one item!

</details>



<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

## Features:
- large bushes\
which has a small chance to contain a sapling inside of it and if it doesn't, the bush is usually covered in leaves, these Bushes can contain leaves/saplings from:\
• Acacia\
• Oak\
• Dark Oak\
• Jungle

- Cactus Family\
are basically tons of cactuses in an area and that will of course contains cactus flowers.

</details>





## Others
this datapack also allows:
- you to cook cactus in a smoker and a campfire to get Grilled Cactus.
- Made cactus edible now! but you will take some damage everytime you eat it.


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
